sections.heading: Project overview
sections.body: The installed furniture is presented within the finished interior, showing how seating contributes to a calm arrival and waiting environment.

sections.heading: What to notice
sections.body: Review lounge-seat placement, usable clearances and how upholstered volumes relate to the surrounding finishes.

sections.heading: Potential project value
sections.body: Furniture selected as part of the complete interior can help establish a calmer first impression and a more comfortable transition into the customer experience.
